sql.if: AND ( a.plan_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR b.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR a.plan_code LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR a.uuid LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR a.id IN ( SELECT distinct a.plan_list_id FROM tb_pmb_plan_benefits_list a, tb_pmb_plan_list b, tb_pmb_plan_benefits c WHERE a.plan_list_id = b.id AND a.plan_benefits_id = c.id AND c.display_yn = 'Y' AND NOW() >= c.display_period_start AND NOW() <= c.display_period_end AND ( c.title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR c.content LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR c.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') ) ) )

choose.when: AND a.second_price IS NOT NULL AND a.second_price != ''

sql.if:
AND (
a.plan_tag1 IN (SELECT b.code FROM tb_pmb_plan_tag_category a, tb_cmm_code b WHERE cate_id =#{searchPlanTag} AND a.tag_id = b.code AND b.code_group = 'plan_tag_code' and b.use_yn = 'Y') OR a.plan_tag2 IN (SELECT b.code FROM tb_pmb_plan_tag_category a, tb_cmm_code b WHERE cate_id =#{searchPlanTag} AND a.tag_id = b.code AND b.code_group = 'plan_tag_code' and b.use_yn = 'Y') OR a.plan_tag3 IN (SELECT b.code FROM tb_pmb_plan_tag_category a, tb_cmm_code b WHERE cate_id =#{searchPlanTag} AND a.tag_id = b.code AND b.code_group = 'plan_tag_code' and b.use_yn = 'Y') OR a.plan_tag4 IN (SELECT b.code FROM tb_pmb_plan_tag_category a, tb_cmm_code b WHERE cate_id =#{searchPlanTag} AND a.tag_id = b.code AND b.code_group = 'plan_tag_code' and b.use_yn = 'Y') OR a.plan_tag5 IN (SELECT b.code FROM tb_pmb_plan_tag_category a, tb_cmm_code b WHERE cate_id =#{searchPlanTag} AND a.tag_id = b.code AND b.code_group = 'plan_tag_code' and b.use_yn = 'Y') )

mapper.sql: a.id ,a.uuid ,a.plan_code ,a.plan_name ,a.plan_name_smt ,a.plan_name_smt_sub ,a.mno ,a.host ,b.name hostNm ,b.company_mng_code as companyMngCode ,a.plan_type ,a.sup_data_val ,a.sup_qos ,a.sup_call_val ,a.sup_sms_val ,a.normal_price ,a.sale_price ,a.after_price ,a.promotion_period ,a.combination_enable ,a.benefit ,a.freebies ,a.link_url ,a.url_smt ,a.business_name ,a.etc ,IFNull(a.sale_status,0) saleStatus ,IFNull(a.disp_yn,0) dispYn ,IFNull(a.new_yn,0) newYn ,a.image_badge_special ,a.image_badge_it_comb ,a.image_badge_add_data ,a.image_badge_add_data_nm ,a.image_badge_simple_open ,a.image_badge_lowest ,a.supp_content ,a.no_supp_content ,a.notice_content ,a.event_banner_image_pc ,a.event_banner_image_mo ,a.event_banner_image_url ,a.event_banner_image_target ,a.create_date ,a.create_id ,a.modified_date ,a.modified_id ,b.logo_img planLogoImg ,a.point_plan_yn ,IF(CAST(sup_qos AS UNSIGNED) >= 1024, CAST(sup_qos AS UNSIGNED) / 1024, 0) AS int_qos ,a.daily_data ,a.second_price ,a.new_num_req_url ,a.num_move_req_url ,a.recom_order1 ,a.recom_order2 ,a.recom_order3 ,a.is_protected ,a.data_create_sp ,b.allyPartnetYn ,a.sup_data_total ,a.marketing_type ,a.pc_url ,a.mo_url ,a.sup_call_buga_val ,a.join_count ,a.recom_order4 ,a.plan_tag1 ,a.plan_tag2 ,a.plan_tag3 ,a.plan_tag4 ,a.plan_tag5 ,GET_CODE_NAME('plan_tag_code',a.plan_tag1) plan_tag1_name ,GET_CODE_NAME('plan_tag_code',a.plan_tag2) plan_tag2_name ,GET_CODE_NAME('plan_tag_code',a.plan_tag3) plan_tag3_name ,GET_CODE_NAME('plan_tag_code',a.plan_tag4) plan_tag4_name ,GET_CODE_NAME('plan_tag_code',a.plan_tag5) plan_tag5_name
mapper.select:
SELECT * FROM ( SELECT
FROM tb_pmb_plan_list a left outer join tb_mbm_company_list b ON a.host = b.id WHERE 1=1
) tb
ORDER BY normal_price
ORDER BY planZzimCnt DESC
ORDER BY after_price DESC
ORDER BY sup_data_total DESC
ORDER BY recom_order1 DESC
ORDER BY recom_order2 DESC
ORDER BY recom_order3 DESC
ORDER BY allyPartnetYn desc, sale_price
ORDER BY ifNull(recom_order4,999) asc, join_count desc
ORDER BY newYn DESC, saleStatus DESC, id DESC
LIMIT #{offset}, #{recordSize}

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT
FROM tb_pmb_plan_list a left outer join tb_mbm_company_list b ON a.host = b.id WHERE 1=1
) tb
ORDER BY normal_price
ORDER BY planZzimCnt DESC
ORDER BY after_price DESC
ORDER BY sup_data_total DESC
ORDER BY id DESC
SELECT count(1) FROM tb_pmb_plan_list a left outer join tb_mbm_company_list b ON a.host = b.id WHERE 1=1

SELECT
FROM tb_pmb_plan_list a left outer join tb_mbm_company_list b ON a.host = b.id WHERE a.id=#{id}

SELECT
FROM tb_pmb_plan_list a left outer join tb_mbm_company_list b ON a.host = b.id WHERE a.uuid=#{uuid}
mapper.update:
UPDATE tb_pmb_plan_list SET plan_code=#{planCode}, disp_yn=#{dispYn}, url_smt=#{urlSmt}, plan_name_smt = #{planNameSmt}, image_badge_special=#{imageBadgeSpecial}, image_badge_it_comb=#{imageBadgeItComb}, image_badge_add_data=#{imageBadgeAddData}, image_badge_simple_open=#{imageBadgeSimpleOpen}, image_badge_lowest=#{imageBadgeLowest}, image_badge_add_data_nm=#{imageBadgeAddDataNm}, supp_content=#{suppContent}, no_supp_content=#{noSuppContent}, notice_content=#{noticeContent},
event_banner_image_pc=#{eventBannerImagePc},
event_banner_image_mo=#{eventBannerImageMo},
event_banner_image_url=#{eventBannerImageUrl}, event_banner_image_target=#{eventBannerImageTarget}, point_plan_yn=#{pointPlanYn}, plan_name_smt_sub=#{planNameSmtSub}, second_price=#{secondPrice}, new_num_req_url=#{newNumReqUrl}, num_move_req_url=#{numMoveReqUrl}, pc_url=#{pcUrl}, mo_url=#{moUrl}, sup_call_buga_val=#{supCallBugaVal}, plan_tag1=#{planTag1}, plan_tag2=#{planTag2}, plan_tag3=#{planTag3}, plan_tag4=#{planTag4}, plan_tag5=#{planTag5}, modified_id=#{modifiedId}, modified_date=NOW() WHERE id=#{id};
mapper.delete: UPDATE tb_pmb_plan_list SET sale_status = 0 WHERE id=#{id}
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM tb_pmb_plan_list a left outer join tb_mbm_company_list b ON a.host = b.id WHERE a.host = #{searchCompany} ORDER BY uuid
SELECT count(1) FROM tb_pmb_plan_list WHERE plan_code=#{planCode}
mapper.update:
UPDATE tb_pmb_plan_list SET
plan_code=#{planCode},
recom_order1=#{recomOrder1},
recom_order2=#{recomOrder2},
recom_order3=#{recomOrder3},
modified_date=NOW() WHERE uuid=#{uuid}

UPDATE tb_pmb_plan_list SET
recom_order1=0,
recom_order2=0,
recom_order3=0,
modified_date=NOW() WHERE hidden_yn = 1
AND sale_price <= 9900
AND sup_data_total = '7168' AND sup_qos > 1
AND sup_data_total = '10240' AND sup_qos > 1
AND sup_data_total = '15360' AND sup_qos > 1
AND sup_data_total = 72704 AND sup_qos > 1
AND sup_data_total >= '102400'
AND host NOT IN ('5', '8', '12')
AND host IN ('5', '8', '12')
mapper.select: SELECT a.id ,a.uuid ,a.telecom ,a.mno ,a.plan_type ,a.plan_name ,a.normal_price ,a.sale_price ,a.after_price ,a.promotion_period ,a.data ,a.qos ,a.voice_call ,a.buga_call ,a.message ,a.combination ,a.benefit ,a.freebies ,a.url ,a.business_name ,a.etc ,a.sale_status ,a.create_date ,a.modified_date ,a.company_id ,a.plan_code ,a.daily_data ,a.m12_price ,a.m24_price ,a.contract_option ,a.hidden_yn ,a.special_category ,a.datasharing_yn ,a.micropayment_yn ,a.data_tethering ,a.agreement_period ,a.qos_blocked ,a.data_daily_tethering ,a.is_protected ,a.pc_url ,a.mo_url ,b.name companyNm ,c.id AS planId ,c.marketing_type FROM tb_pmb_plan_data a left outer join tb_mbm_company_list b ON a.company_id = b.id left outer join tb_pmb_plan_list c ON a.uuid = c.uuid WHERE a.uuid=#{uuid}
mapper.update: UPDATE tb_pmb_plan_data SET telecom = #{telecom}, mno = #{mno}, plan_type = #{planType}, plan_name = #{planName}, normal_price = #{normalPrice}, sale_price = #{salePrice}, after_price = #{afterPrice}, promotion_period = #{promotionPeriod}, data = #{data}, qos = #{qos}, voice_call = #{voiceCall}, buga_call = #{bugaCall}, message = #{message}, combination = #{combination}, benefit = #{benefit}, freebies = #{freebies}, url = #{url}, business_name = #{businessName}, sale_status = #{saleStatus}, modified_date = Now(), company_id = #{companyId}, plan_code = #{planCode}, daily_data = #{dailyData}, m12_price = #{m12Price}, m24_price = #{m24Price}, hidden_yn = #{hiddenYn}, pc_url = #{pcUrl}, mo_url = #{moUrl} WHERE uuid = #{uuid};
mapper.select:
SELECT
,c.plan_memo as chatbotPlanMeno ,c.recom_yn as chatbotPlanRecomYn ,c.low_price_yn as chatbotPlanLowPriceYn ,c.max_benefit_yn as chatbotPlanMaxBenefitYn ,c.order_seq AS chatbotPlanOrderNo FROM tb_pmb_plan_list a left outer join tb_mbm_company_list b ON a.host = b.id left outer join tb_svc_chatbot_group_plan c ON a.id = c.plan WHERE c.chatbot_group_id = #{searchChatbotGroupId} ORDER BY c.order_seq
mapper.update: UPDATE tb_pmb_plan_list SET recom_order4 = ${recomOrder4} WHERE id=#{id}

UPDATE tb_pmb_plan_list SET modified_id=#{modifiedId}, plan_tag1=#{planTag1}, plan_tag2=#{planTag2}, plan_tag3=#{planTag3}, plan_tag4=#{planTag4}, plan_tag5=#{planTag5}, modified_date=NOW() WHERE id=#{id}
